GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.RespinCollectionBody1: At the start of any main game spin, the Respin value on the left side of the reels will be reset to 0.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.RespinCollectionBody2: After any winning spin, once wins are paid, all low-paying winning symbols (Ace symbol, King symbol, Queen symbol, Jack symbol and Ten symbol) will be collected in the Respin collection slot on the left side of the reels.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.RespinCollectionBody3: The Respin value will be added by 1 for every 5 low-paying winning symbols collected.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.RespinCollectionBody4: If no winning combination appears on the reels and there is at least 1 Respin value, a Respin value will be used to award a free respin (Scatter symbols will remain on the reels).
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierCollectionBody1: At the start of any main game spin, the Multiplier value on the right side of the reels will be reset to x1.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierCollectionBody2: After any winning spin, once wins are paid, all high-paying winning symbols (Witch symbol, Hansel symbol, Gretel symbol, Cupcake symbol and Bread symbol) will be collected in the Multiplier collection slot on the right side of the reels.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierCollectionBody3: The Multiplier value will be increased by x1 for every 5 high-paying winning symbols collected.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierCollectionBody4: All wins will be multiplied by the current Multiplier shown on the right side of the reels.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody1: 3 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the Respin value on the left side of the reels will be reset to 0, and the Multiplier value on the right side of the reels will be reset to x2.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody3: After any winning spin, once wins are paid, all low-paying winning symbols will be collected in the Respin collection slot on the left side of the reels, while all high-paying winning symbols will be collected in the Multiplier collection slot on the right side of the reels.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody4: For every 4 low-paying winning symbols collected, the Respin value increases by 1. For every 4 high-paying winning symbols collected, the Multiplier value increases by x2.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody5: If no winning combination appears on the reels and there is at least 1 Respin value, a Respin value will be used to award a free respin (+1 Spin symbol will remain on the reels).
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody6: All wins will be multiplied by the current Multiplier shown on the right side of the reels.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinsFeatureBody7: At the end of every free spin, 1 free spin will be awarded for each +1 Spin symbol on the reels (if any).
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.MaximumWinBody1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.MaximumWinBody2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Body125Ways1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Body125Ways2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
GrimmBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.

GrimmBountyRules.GeneralRules1: Grimms' Bounty: Hansel & Gretel is a 3-reels, 5-rows video slot featuring increasing multipliers and extra respins.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet for %{125} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form. %{125} are number that needs to be formatted
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet for 125 ways (fixed),bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GrimmBountyRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
